INR and external balance are stable. The principal macro caveat is cycle positioning: equity valuations are running near 10-year averages on aggregate, and the strategy in question (quality-compounder) trades at a premium to that aggregate; macro tailwinds support the asset class allocation but do not protect against multiple compression in the specific sub-segment.
